title: Electric Religious
summary: December 24, 2018 Born and raised in Prince Albert, Saskatchewan, Métis singer-songwriter and guitarist Brandon Baker is storming the indie rock scene with his band, Electric Religious. As a kid, Brandon learned from traditional Métis songs, accompanying his fiddle-playing brother on guitar and usin...

title: USDA to conduct Census of Agriculture special studies on aquaculture and irrigation this winter
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) will conduct two special studies as part of the 2017 Census of Agriculture to collect more detailed information on aquaculture and irrigation practices in U.S. agriculture.
